description: Recent (2024–2026) Addis Ababa developer projects compiled for EthioMLS import. Linked to data/developers/addis-developers.json via registrationNumber (ET-DIR-*). Not an official registry extract.

description.en: Off-plan commercial mall in Kazanchis (2B+G+11): ~6,762 m² site / ~86,000 m² built-up. Custom shops from 15 m², 14 lifts, escalators, rooftop leisure, 24/7 power and CCTV. Subsidiary of Ovid Holding. Price on request — https://kavodcommercial.com/Kavodmall.html
description.am: በካዛንቺስ የሚገኝ ለንግድ ሞል (2B+G+11)። ከ15 ካሬ ጀምሮ ሱቆች፣ 14 ሊፍት፣ የጣሪያ መዝናኛ። ዋጋ ለማወቅ ያግኙን።

projects.addressLine: Kazanchis · near former 6th police station · Friendship / Unity Park axis

description.en: Customizable off-plan commercial shop on ground floor of Kavod Mall Kazanchis. From 15 m²; interest-free loan options up to 50% and milestone payment plans. Contact +251 989 222 227 / 6227. Price on request.

description.en: Larger ground-level retail bay in Kavod Mall Kazanchis (175 shops on G). Custom size available. Delivery targeted ~9–12 months per sales kit. Price on request.

description.en: Off-plan fashion & commercial mall opposite the Spanish Embassy, Shiromeda (5B+G+6+T). ~11,328–11,362 m²; roller coaster terrace; 14 lifts. Shops from 15 m². https://kavodcommercial.com/Tibebmall.html

The Megenagna Top View · 1 bedroom · 60 m². List 7,200,000 ETB. Payment plan: 20% down 1,440,000 · 40% total 2,880,000 · 60% total 4,032,000 · 100% cash 4,680,000 ETB. Seken diaspora sales kit July 2026.

The Megenagna Top View · 2 bedrooms · 90 m². List 10,800,000 ETB. Payment plan: 20% down 2,160,000 · 40% total 4,320,000 · 60% total 6,048,000 · 100% cash 7,020,000 ETB. Seken diaspora sales kit July 2026.
